conceptClusters.title: Retrieved parser document accessibility form and table evidence
exitEvidence: Learner retrieves complete document, authored-source versus parsed-DOM, accessibility-evidence, form-recovery, and every-cell table-context invariants before diagnosing interactions.
Learner predicts which prior invariant a changed source, state, content, relationship, resource, input, or viewport can violate.

conceptClusters.title: Conformance diagnostics and consumer-specific causal inspection
exitEvidence: Learner treats conformance messages as precise evidence, verifies the reported source range and rule, repairs causes in dependency order, and reruns the checker without assuming clean output proves semantic or task correctness.
Learner chooses source, DOM, accessibility, network, console, request, form-entry, table-context, media, keyboard, zoom, and observed-task surfaces according to the hypothesis each can falsify.

conceptClusters.title: Invariant-driven changed-content and failure regression
exitEvidence: Learner derives tests from named invariants rather than examples and mutates long and translated text, order, quantity, resources, identifiers, relationships, input, state, keyboard path, zoom, viewport, persistence, failure, and recovery without changing the objective.
Learner diagnoses rejected near-misses, preserves prior correct behavior, records exact observable evidence, and refuses passing-example claims.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A worked causal map connects complete source, parser recovery, conformance messages, consumer traces, named invariants, changed cases, and bounded accessibility evidence.
activityDesigns.startingState: A malformed but plausible service page, source, DOM, checker messages, network and console traces, accessibility evidence, form request, table contexts, and mutations are provided without diagnosis.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner predicts and explains all seven new or retrieved concepts through four integrated cases.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback contrasts one committed hypothesis with the first divergent observable and never supplies the repair.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Worked guidance reveals source, parser, checker, consumer, task, and mutation layers one at a time.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires a revised hypothesis and a smaller parallel mutation before continuing.

interactions.title: Predict source parser and document envelope
interactions.learnerAction: Predict authored source, parser-repaired DOM, rendering mode, root, head, body, title, metadata, and content consequences for malformed complete and fragment-only changed documents.

evidence.observable: Prediction identifies exact source defect, parser action, DOM difference, document consumer consequence, and conforming repair.
evidence.changedCase: A missing quote and misplaced body content are followed by a new metadata element.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Rendered appearance proves complete stable document.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace bytes through parser into document consumers.

interactions.title: Inspect prior task evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect accessibility claim scope, multi-error recovery, exact table header context, keyboard and zoom task results, and their limits after one shared relationship mutation.
interactions.artifactChange: Prior invariant evidence map is saved.

evidence.observable: Each claim identifies capable evidence, task, setup, result, limit, repair, retest, and unresolved risk.
evidence.changedCase: Duplicate identifiers break an error reference and an irregular table header reference.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Validator message or clean score replaces task evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace each consumer relationship and complete task.

interactions.title: Inspect causal validation evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Classify checker errors, warnings, info, source ranges, rule claims, cascades, and tool limits; compare source, DOM, accessibility, network, console, and task surfaces to rank root-cause hypotheses.
interactions.artifactChange: A causal validation trace is saved.

evidence.observable: Every message and inspection surface is tied to a falsifiable hypothesis, first divergence, dependency order, and bounded conclusion.
evidence.changedCase: Fixing one quote removes four downstream messages but leaves a semantic task failure.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First checker message or visual symptom always names root cause.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify reported range, rule, parser effect, and consumers in dependency order.

interactions.title: Explain invariant-driven mutation
interactions.learnerAction: Explain how named document, parser, accessibility, recovery, table, and task invariants generate changed text, order, resource, identifier, relationship, input, state, keyboard, zoom, viewport, and failure tests.

evidence.observable: Each mutation names protected invariant, expected observation, rejected near-miss, failure meaning, repair boundary, and regression value.
evidence.changedCase: The passing fixture gains translation, duplicate IDs, missing resources, invalid input, and narrow zoom.

interactions.feedbackTarget: More random inputs or snapshots prove robustness.
interactions.correctionRoute: Derive one mutation from one causal invariant.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An emergency-shelter information and intake page is diagnosed, repaired, and protected by named changed-case regressions across every prior invariant.
activityDesigns.startingState: An original fictional shelter page renders plausibly but contains interacting document, parser, relationship, request, table, accessibility, content, and failure defects.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner repairs causes in dependency order and proves the complete shelter task under adversarial mutations.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback identifies the first mismatched observable, unmet competency, consequence, and smallest next inspection without giving finished markup.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints progress from hypothesis to evidence surface to source range to invariant, never directly to the solution.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A failed repair must reproduce the cause in a reduced case, fix it, and pass a fresh mutation.

interactions.title: Predict shelter parser recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Predict source and DOM consequences of unclosed attributes, misnested emphasis, invalid table children, nested interactive content, missing end tags, and duplicate attributes before opening tools.

evidence.observable: Each defect predicts exact tokenization or tree-construction consequence and affected consumer.
evidence.changedCase: A new link and table row are inserted beside the malformed source.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser will repair markup to author intent.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace token and insertion-mode behavior from first malformed boundary.

interactions.title: Inspect complete shelter document
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect doctype, standards mode, html language, head encoding, title, viewport, metadata, body content, source order, parsed ownership, and title-bar output in the full saved response.

evidence.observable: Source, response, DOM, rendering mode, metadata consumers, and body task content agree after changed head and body insertion.
evidence.changedCase: A fragment scaffold is replaced by a complete document with translated title.

interactions.feedbackTarget: DOM-added head and body prove authored completeness.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect saved bytes and independent document consumers.

interactions.title: Run shelter conformance check
interactions.learnerAction: Run a current Nu HTML checker against exact saved source; record version, input, message severity, source range, rule, cascade hypothesis, and tool limits without editing blindly.

evidence.observable: Every message is reproducible and classified as root candidate, consequence, advisory, intent-dependent gap, or irrelevant to current hypothesis.
evidence.changedCase: Checker version and one malformed attribute both change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Checker list is an ordered repair recipe.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify each message against source and parser behavior.

interactions.title: Compare source and parsed DOM
interactions.learnerAction: Compare exact shelter source with live DOM for inserted, moved, split, omitted, foster-parented, implicitly closed, and script-mutated nodes; record first divergence and downstream relationships.

evidence.observable: Every DOM difference is attributed to parser, script, browser normalization, or author source with affected task consumers.
evidence.changedCase: A malformed table row moves content and a script adds a status node.

interactions.feedbackTarget: DOM inspector displays original source with formatting changes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare stable node identity, parent, order, attributes, and origin.

interactions.title: Inspect accessibility evidence after conformance
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect role, name, description, inclusion, reading order, focus, keyboard, zoom, status, and complete shelter tasks after syntax repairs; preserve checker limits and unresolved evidence.

evidence.observable: Clean checker output is separated from semantic, behavior, environment, task, and observed-user evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Conforming generic controls and a visually reordered form remain task failures.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Valid HTML is necessarily accessible and usable.
interactions.correctionRoute: Choose evidence capable of falsifying each remaining claim.

interactions.title: Inspect resources network and console
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect resolved URLs, requests, status, redirects, MIME type, timing, blocked content, console diagnostics, loaded DOM, image alternatives, media fallback, and task result for shelter resources.

evidence.observable: Missing or wrong resource cause is distinguished from valid markup, layout, alternative, script, permission, and network symptoms.
evidence.changedCase: Base path moves, image fails, stylesheet redirects, and media MIME changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Broken appearance proves an HTML syntax defect.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace URL through request, response, consumer, and task.

interactions.title: Test shelter error recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Submit diverse valid and invalid intake cases, inspect validation flags, error relationships, focus, retained values, request entries, response, side-effect ledger, correction, and perceivable success.
interactions.artifactChange: Shelter recovery diagnostic evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Source, DOM, validity, accessibility, request, server, side-effect, and task evidence locate the first failed recovery invariant.
evidence.changedCase: Two server errors, retry, optional field, disabled control, and duplicate submit are introduced.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Validator or client validity state explains server behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace control state through entry list, request, response, correction, and effect.

interactions.title: Test shelter table contexts
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect every capacity table cell's coordinates, groups, spans, scopes, IDs, headers tokens, computed context, table navigation, copy, linearization, zoom, and local scrolling after syntax repair.
interactions.artifactChange: Shelter table diagnostic evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Conformance, geometry, references, computed context, responsive behavior, and comparison task evidence remain separate and complete.
evidence.changedCase: A location group splits, column moves, identifier duplicates, and labels lengthen.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Valid th and scope syntax proves every-cell context.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace each cell from grid through association and task.

interactions.title: Rank competing shelter hypotheses
interactions.learnerAction: Rank source syntax, parser recovery, invalid structure, URL, response, CSS, script, accessibility mapping, form state, table relationship, content, and environment hypotheses using expected discriminating observations.

evidence.observable: Each hypothesis predicts a unique observation, cheapest safe check, disconfirming result, and next branch.
evidence.changedCase: Appearance stays broken after validation becomes clean.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Most visible symptom identifies most likely cause.
interactions.correctionRoute: Choose checks by information gain and causal layer.

interactions.title: Repair shelter causes in dependency order
interactions.learnerAction: Repair complete document and earliest parser cause first, rerun checker, recompare DOM, then repair semantic, relationship, resource, behavior, content, and task causes without masking downstream evidence.

evidence.observable: Each minimal repair changes predicted evidence, preserves unrelated correctness, and reduces downstream uncertainty.
evidence.changedCase: A new sibling, attribute, resource, and conditional form state are added after repair.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Bulk rewrite is faster proof of correctness.
interactions.correctionRoute: Change one causal boundary and rerun dependent observations.

interactions.title: Mutate shelter content and language
interactions.learnerAction: Double and empty headings, labels, errors, table cells, notices, link purposes, alternatives, captions, transcripts, and titles; translate and change direction while preserving all named invariants.

evidence.observable: Structure, identity, relationships, reflow, focus, tasks, and complete information survive length, absence, translation, and direction changes.
evidence.changedCase: Every user-facing string changes length, language, direction, or presence.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Lorem ipsum and one long English string cover content variation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Mutate semantic role, relationship, length, language, and absence deliberately.

interactions.title: Mutate shelter resources and failures
interactions.learnerAction: Remove, slow, redirect, replace, mismatch, deny, and corrupt images, styles, scripts, fonts, media, embeds, and navigation destinations; verify truthful fallbacks, alternatives, bounds, and tasks.

evidence.observable: Essential content and operation survive or report bounded failure without broken claims, hidden context, or unsafe retries.
evidence.changedCase: All resource consumers receive different realistic failure modes at once.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Offline mode alone covers resource variation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Mutate request, response, content type, timing, and consumer separately.

interactions.title: Mutate identifiers and relationships
interactions.learnerAction: Duplicate, remove, rename, reorder, retarget, and cross-scope IDs, labels, descriptions, errors, fragments, headers, ownership, control, captions, and ARIA references; inspect every consumer.

evidence.observable: Every reference resolves uniquely to intended current target and all dependent tasks preserve exact context.
evidence.changedCase: Shared identifiers, order, ownership, table groups, and error targets change together.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Uniqueness validator proves relationship meaning.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test each producer, reference, target, scope, and consumer.

interactions.title: Mutate input state and recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Vary empty, whitespace, Unicode, long, boundary, decimal, international, repeated, disabled, readonly, selected, checked, autofilled, pasted, reset, retry, double-submit, and server-rejected input states.

evidence.observable: Validity, entry list, request, errors, retained values, correction, side effects, and success match each exact state.
evidence.changedCase: Multiple controls change default, current, dirty, disabled, and server-validity states.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One invalid and one valid example cover form behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Partition state space by distinct behavior and request consequence.

interactions.title: Mutate viewport input and order
interactions.learnerAction: Narrow, zoom, enlarge text, change orientation and direction, use keyboard and touch, reverse focus, insert and hide controls, and verify reflow, focus visibility, sequence, table access, and task continuation.

evidence.observable: Complete responsive variations preserve meaningful order, operation, content, context, focus, and bounded two-dimensional access.
evidence.changedCase: Viewport narrows while text triples, direction changes, and a status action appears.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Three screenshots prove responsive interaction.
interactions.correctionRoute: Exercise changed tasks, not only visual snapshots.

interactions.title: Explain shelter diagnostic suite
interactions.learnerAction: Explain every hypothesis, evidence surface, checker message, first divergence, root cause, repair, named invariant, mutation, rejected near-miss, retest, limitation, and remaining risk.
interactions.artifactChange: Shelter causal regression ledger is committed.

evidence.observable: Every conclusion is traceable from changed task through consumer evidence to repaired source without validator or screenshot overclaim.
evidence.changedCase: A new defect produces the same visual symptom from a different causal layer.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Passing final checks proves the diagnostic explanation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Falsify one causal claim with a discriminating mutation.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A community directory transfers causal validation and invariant-driven regression with reduced guidance and unrelated content and defects.
activityDesigns.startingState: A partial directory, service search, contact form, hours table, and status feed include goals and raw evidence only.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner diagnoses, repairs, mutates, and explains all seven concepts with faded support.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports only the first divergent observable and competency after submission.
activityDesigns.hintContract: One optional cue names an evidence layer or invariant, never the repair.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss routes to one smaller parallel directory case before retry.

interactions.title: Complete directory source-DOM trace
interactions.learnerAction: Complete authored source, parser recovery, full document envelope, DOM, rendering-mode, title, metadata, and content-consumer trace for changed malformed directory markup.

evidence.observable: First malformed boundary, exact DOM consequence, consumer impact, conforming repair, and insertion mutation are correct.
evidence.changedCase: A missing quote and invalid table child precede a translated metadata change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Rendered DOM is enough to recover source cause.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace from saved source through parser.

interactions.title: Test directory access recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Test complementary accessibility evidence, multi-error contact correction, every-cell hours-table context, keyboard, zoom, request, and task results after changed ID and order mutations.
interactions.artifactChange: Directory prerequisite regression evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Each prior invariant has reproducible capable evidence, limitation, repair, changed retest, and remaining risk.
evidence.changedCase: Identifiers duplicate, error order reverses, and table groups split.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Clean validator output proves prior accessibility paths.
interactions.correctionRoute: Retest each complete consumer task.

interactions.title: Complete directory hypothesis tree
interactions.learnerAction: Complete competing syntax, parser, document, URL, network, CSS, script, semantics, form, table, content, and environment hypotheses with discriminating observations and dependency order.

evidence.observable: Checker, source, DOM, accessibility, network, console, request, and task surfaces are selected by falsification value.
evidence.changedCase: The same missing content symptom persists after source becomes conforming.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First message or symptom identifies cause.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rank hypotheses by predicted divergent evidence.

interactions.title: Repair directory causes
interactions.learnerAction: Repair earliest document and parser causes, rerun the checker and DOM diff, then repair relationship, resource, behavior, content, and task causes one dependency at a time.

evidence.observable: Each minimal change produces predicted evidence, preserves unrelated correctness, and passes a new sibling mutation.
evidence.changedCase: New service cards, form state, table row, and missing resource are added.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Bulk rewrite is an acceptable causal repair.
interactions.correctionRoute: Change and verify one causal boundary at a time.

interactions.title: Build directory mutation suite
interactions.learnerAction: Test changed text, language, direction, quantity, order, resources, IDs, relationships, inputs, states, keyboard, zoom, viewport, persistence, network, retry, and recovery against named directory invariants.
interactions.artifactChange: Directory mutation suite evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Every mutation has protected invariant, expected observation, near-miss, failure meaning, repair boundary, and regression result.
evidence.changedCase: All content, relationship, state, resource, input, and viewport dimensions change together.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Random fuzzing or snapshot count proves robustness.
interactions.correctionRoute: Derive mutations from causal invariants.

interactions.title: Defend directory diagnosis and regressions
interactions.learnerAction: Explain first divergences, repairs, rejected near-misses, invariant coverage, mutation partitions, task evidence, tool and environment limits, unresolved risks, and later regression value.

evidence.observable: Claims remain source-, consumer-, task-, environment-, and mutation-specific without validator, score, or passing-example overclaim.
evidence.changedCase: A new environment creates the same symptom through a different mechanism.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Passing suite is sufficient defense.
interactions.correctionRoute: Falsify one claim and bound all conclusions.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A reduced clinic diagnoses interacting source, path, form, table, accessibility, and changed-case failures without symptom patches.
activityDesigns.startingState: Four unseen cases share misleading symptoms but arise from different causal layers.
activityDesigns.completionState: Every cause is isolated, minimally repaired, and protected by a discriminating mutation.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reveals only the first trace divergence after the learner commits a diagnosis.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints name the next evidence surface, never a source edit.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Symptom patches fail until a reduced causal reproduction and changed retest pass.

interactions.title: Predict interacting parser and document fallout
interactions.learnerAction: Predict how a missing attribute quote absorbs paths and form markup, parser repair moves table content, and fragment-only source changes head, body, title, request, error, and header-context evidence.

evidence.observable: Prediction distinguishes source defect, parser action, DOM tree, URL, form, table, and document-consumer consequences.
evidence.changedCase: A new link, input, and grouped header are inserted beside the defect.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Each visible failure has an independent cause.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace earliest malformed token through all consumers.

interactions.title: Inspect conflicting clinic evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Compare checker, source, DOM, accessibility, network, console, validity, entry-list, request, server, table context, keyboard, zoom, and task evidence to distinguish four identical surface symptoms.

evidence.observable: Each case has a unique first divergence, disconfirmed alternatives, dependency order, and bounded cause claim.
evidence.changedCase: One tool changes messages while underlying behavior remains the same.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Checker message severity ranks root causes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Select one observation that separates competing hypotheses.

interactions.title: Debug clinic causes without masking
interactions.learnerAction: Repair earliest source and parser cause, then path, relationship, form-state, table-context, accessibility, and task causes; reject CSS, ARIA, hidden-input, duplicated-label, and retry patches that conceal evidence.

evidence.observable: Each repair changes predicted evidence, leaves other cases unresolved until their cause changes, and preserves correct paths.
evidence.changedCase: A repaired case receives a new sibling, ID, path, invalid input, and table group.

interactions.feedbackTarget: If symptom disappears the patch is causal.
interactions.correctionRoute: Demand discriminating evidence and minimal dependency-ordered change.

interactions.title: Explain discriminating clinic mutations
interactions.learnerAction: Explain which content, resource, identifier, relationship, input, state, order, keyboard, zoom, viewport, failure, and recovery mutations distinguish each root cause and protect repaired invariants.

evidence.observable: Each mutation would fail a rejected near-miss, preserve the objective, and report the exact invariant and first divergence.
evidence.changedCase: All four cases receive the same mutation but only one regression returns.

interactions.feedbackTarget: More random cases improve causal discrimination.
interactions.correctionRoute: Design a mutation that falsifies one repair claim.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An independent school-information site gains a reproducible causal diagnostic record and invariant-driven regression suite.
activityDesigns.startingState: An original school brief, malformed starter, task requirements, evidence fixtures, and local checker boundary are provided without diagnosis or solutions.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner independently repairs causes, proves complete prior paths, mutates realistic dimensions, and defends bounded conclusions.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports only observed pass or first fail plus the affected competency.
activityDesigns.hintContract: No procedural hints appear before a failed attempt; later hints remain conceptual.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Failure routes to one reduced prerequisite case and a parallel resubmission.

interactions.title: Build school source and document truth
interactions.learnerAction: Build conforming complete school documents from saved bytes; repair parser causes; verify doctype, mode, language, encoding, head, title, viewport, body, source, DOM, and changed insertion stability.

evidence.observable: Authored source and stable parsed DOM match intended document consumers after malformed and inserted cases.
evidence.changedCase: A translated title, new metadata, sibling content, and malformed attribute are introduced.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser-generated document structure is equivalent.
interactions.correctionRoute: Repair source and verify every consumer.

interactions.title: Test school access invariants
interactions.learnerAction: Test complementary accessibility evidence, enrollment multi-error recovery, schedule every-cell header context, keyboard, zoom, requests, side effects, and complete information tasks before and after changed relationships.

evidence.observable: Each prior competency has reproducible task, technical evidence, changed retest, limits, and unresolved risk.
evidence.changedCase: Error relationships, table groups, IDs, viewport, and input state all change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Passing checker and automation prove access paths.
interactions.correctionRoute: Retest complete consumer-specific tasks.

interactions.title: Build school diagnostic record
interactions.learnerAction: Build competing hypotheses and reproducible checker, source, DOM, accessibility, network, console, form, table, responsive, and task evidence; identify first divergences and repair order.
interactions.artifactChange: School causal diagnostic record is committed.

evidence.observable: Every conclusion cites exact input, tool or environment, observation, disconfirmed alternative, root cause, repair, retest, limit, and risk.
evidence.changedCase: A clean checker run accompanies a broken resource and semantic task.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One preferred tool can diagnose all HTML failures.
interactions.correctionRoute: Match hypothesis to capable falsifying evidence.

interactions.title: Test dependency-ordered school repairs
interactions.learnerAction: Repair one earliest cause at a time, rerun dependent evidence, preserve unrelated correct behavior, compare rejected surface patches, and verify a new source, state, relationship, and environment case.

evidence.observable: Each minimal repair produces predicted causal changes across checker, DOM, consumers, and task without masking another layer.
evidence.changedCase: New content recreates the old symptom through a different cause.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Bulk clean rewrite proves diagnosis.
interactions.correctionRoute: Falsify the cause with one minimal changed repair.

interactions.title: Run school adversarial regression suite
interactions.learnerAction: Mutate text, language, direction, quantity, order, resources, IDs, relationships, inputs, states, keyboard, zoom, viewport, persistence, network, failure, retry, reset, and recovery against named invariants.
interactions.artifactChange: School adversarial regression evidence is stored.

evidence.observable: Every test protects named behavior, fails a near-miss, preserves objective, and reports exact first divergence and repair boundary.
evidence.changedCase: Every realistic mutation dimension changes simultaneously across complete school tasks.

interactions.feedbackTarget: High test count or snapshots prove coverage.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace each test to invariant and causal failure.

interactions.title: Defend school causal regression quality
interactions.learnerAction: Defend hypotheses, sources, tool versions, environments, tasks, repairs, near-miss rejections, invariant partitions, mutations, retests, evidence limits, remaining risks, and future maintenance without publication overclaim.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent school diagnostic defense is committed.

evidence.observable: Every claim is reproducible, consumer-specific, task-specific, mutation-tested, evidence-bounded, and honest about review and pilot gaps.
evidence.changedCase: Checker version, browser, content policy, and user-reported barrier change after signoff.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Green suite permits robust or accessible label.
interactions.correctionRoute: Narrow claims and schedule missing evidence.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: Delayed retrieval reconnects source, parser, document, accessibility, form, table, diagnosis, and changed-case invariants without earlier artifacts.
activityDesigns.startingState: Unseen reduced cases appear without notes, checker output, or prior solutions.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner retrieves, predicts, corrects, and explains each causal model and schedules later evidence by competency.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reveals the first mismatch only after commitment.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Retrieval is unaided first; correction then reveals one principle and a fresh parallel case.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss triggers explanation, changed correction, and later reassessment.

interactions.title: Retrieve parser recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Retrieve token, tree-construction, implied-end, misnesting, foster-parenting, invalid-attribute, source-DOM, and stable repair evidence for unseen malformed markup.

evidence.observable: Prediction names exact source cause, DOM consequence, consumer impact, conforming repair, and changed insertion.
evidence.changedCase: A sibling element and malformed attribute are inserted near the defect.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser recovery follows intended indentation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace parser from earliest malformed token.

interactions.title: Retrieve complete documents
interactions.learnerAction: Retrieve doctype, standards mode, html language, head encoding, title, viewport, metadata, body, source, DOM, and title-bar requirements from an empty unseen file.

evidence.observable: Complete authored source and every consumer remain correct after metadata and body changes.
evidence.changedCase: Language, title, metadata, and first body region all change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser-added nodes equal complete source.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rebuild the serialized document envelope.

interactions.title: Retrieve bounded accessibility evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Retrieve claim-to-evidence matching, tool and environment limits, task outcomes, participant scope, failures, repairs, retests, and unresolved risk without one-score proof.

evidence.observable: Every conclusion remains proportional to reproducible capable evidence and explicit limits.
evidence.changedCase: A second environment and task contradict a clean automated result.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Multiple tools combine into conformance proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Bound each claim to actual observation.

interactions.title: Retrieve form recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Retrieve multi-error identification, relationships, retained values, summary, focus, correction, request, side-effect, and success evidence under changed valid and invalid states.

evidence.observable: Every error is perceivable, locatable, understandable, correctable, cleared, and submitted once.
evidence.changedCase: Errors arrive from server, clear in reverse order, and retry once.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Native validity proves full recovery.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace complete error-to-success task.

interactions.title: Retrieve table header context
interactions.learnerAction: Retrieve simple, grouped, and irregular every-cell header associations after row, column, span, group, ID, copy, linearization, and narrow-width changes.

evidence.observable: Every data value retains exact intended actual headers and no unrelated context.
evidence.changedCase: Groups split, columns reorder, spans change, and one ID duplicates.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Valid th syntax proves context.
interactions.correctionRoute: Derive context from grid and references.

interactions.title: Predict the useful diagnostic surface
interactions.learnerAction: Predict whether checker, source, DOM, accessibility tree, network, console, validity, request, server, table context, responsive interaction, or observed task evidence best separates unseen hypotheses.

evidence.observable: Chosen evidence can falsify exact hypothesis and identifies expected disconfirming observation and next branch.
evidence.changedCase: The same missing-content symptom arises from source, network, and hiding causes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Validator is first and final debugging surface.
interactions.correctionRoute: Choose by causal layer and information gain.

interactions.title: Predict invariant-breaking mutations
interactions.learnerAction: Predict which changed text, language, resource, ID, relationship, input, state, order, keyboard, zoom, viewport, persistence, failure, and recovery case will break each unseen near-miss.

evidence.observable: Each mutation preserves objective, targets one causal invariant, fails the near-miss, and reports exact observable divergence.
evidence.changedCase: The happy path passes while translation, duplicate ID, and retry cases fail.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Random edge cases are sufficient.
interactions.correctionRoute: Derive mutation from named invariant.

interactions.title: Correct a validator-only diagnosis
interactions.learnerAction: Correct a report that treats checker order as repair order and clean output as semantic, accessibility, link, form, table, responsive, and task proof; retain valid checker evidence.

evidence.observable: Checker findings remain exact bounded evidence within a dependency-ordered consumer and task investigation.
evidence.changedCase: Source becomes conforming while task still fails in a changed environment.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Reject validation because it is incomplete.
interactions.correctionRoute: Keep conformance evidence and add capable complementary surfaces.

interactions.title: Correct a symptom patch
interactions.learnerAction: Replace CSS hiding, ARIA override, duplicate label, hidden input, retry loop, and broad rewrite patches with first-divergence diagnosis and minimal dependency-ordered repair.

evidence.observable: Repair changes predicted source-to-task evidence and preserves unrelated behavior under a new sibling case.
evidence.changedCase: The same visual symptom is reintroduced from another causal layer.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Symptom disappearance establishes root cause.
interactions.correctionRoute: Falsify cause and test minimal repair.

interactions.title: Correct shallow regression tests
interactions.learnerAction: Replace snapshots, keyword checks, fixed examples, random fuzzing, and duplicated inputs with invariant-linked behavioral, consumer, task, changed-case, and rejected-near-miss evidence.

evidence.observable: Each test names invariant, partition, mutation, expected behavior, failure meaning, near-miss, repair boundary, and later value.
evidence.changedCase: Content and state change while required behavior remains the same.

interactions.feedbackTarget: More assertions or fixtures guarantee depth.
interactions.correctionRoute: Start from observable invariant and causal near-miss.

interactions.title: Explain cumulative HTML diagnosis
interactions.learnerAction: Explain how source, parser, complete document, accessibility, form, table, diagnostic surfaces, dependency-ordered repair, invariants, mutations, and bounded conclusions protect complete HTML tasks.

evidence.observable: Every claim traces exact changed task to consumer evidence, first divergence, repaired source, regression, limit, and correction path.
evidence.changedCase: Source, content, relationships, resources, state, viewport, and environment all mutate.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Debugging tools are independent recipes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace one invariant across every dependent layer.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A secure checkpoint measures source-DOM prediction, complete documents, bounded accessibility evidence, form and table invariants, causal diagnosis, changed testing, and defense.
activityDesigns.startingState: Unseen transit, clinic, food-service, and public-notice cases use original source and evidence traces.
activityDesigns.completionState: Server-side grading records concept evidence without exposing hints or canonical answers.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Scoring records observable evidence per concept after submission.
activityDesigns.hintContract: No assessment hints or canonical answers are exposed.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Failure records gaps and later routes to worked correction and a different form.

interactions.title: Trace unseen parser recovery
interactions.learnerAction: Predict exact source, token, tree-construction, DOM parent/order/attribute, rendering, semantics, URL, form, table, and task consequences of unseen malformed HTML.

evidence.observable: Earliest source cause, defined recovery, downstream consumers, conforming repair, and insertion mutation are exact.
evidence.changedCase: A sibling link, control, and table cell are added near the defect.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Browser recovery follows intended indentation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record parser-recovery competency gap.

interactions.title: Build unseen complete document
interactions.learnerAction: Build doctype, root language, head encoding, title, viewport, truthful metadata, and body content from empty source; verify source, DOM, mode, title, and changed metadata/body insertion.

evidence.observable: Authored source and every document consumer remain correct without hidden scaffold.
evidence.changedCase: Language, title, metadata, and first body section all change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Body fragment that renders is complete.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record document-envelope competency gap.

interactions.title: Defend bounded access evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Defend unseen accessibility, multi-error recovery, every-cell table context, keyboard, zoom, request, task, environment, and tool conclusions without treating validation, automation, or one participant as proof.

evidence.observable: Every conclusion is reproducible, task-specific, consumer-specific, changed-tested, evidence-bounded, and explicit about risks.
evidence.changedCase: Errors, table groups, IDs, viewport, browser, and participant evidence change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Passing checker and automation establish access.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record prerequisite-evidence competency gaps.

interactions.title: Choose diagnostic surfaces
interactions.learnerAction: For unseen competing syntax, parser, document, path, network, CSS, script, semantic, form, table, content, and environment hypotheses, choose discriminating evidence, expected result, and next branch.

evidence.observable: Each checker, source, DOM, accessibility, network, console, request, table, responsive, or task check can falsify an exact hypothesis.
evidence.changedCase: The same visual symptom appears from three different causal layers.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Preferred tool or first message is always best.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record evidence-selection competency gap.

interactions.title: Debug unseen causes in order
interactions.learnerAction: Identify first divergence, repair earliest source and parser cause, rerun dependent evidence, then repair relationship, resource, behavior, content, and task causes while rejecting symptom patches.

evidence.observable: Each minimal repair changes predicted evidence, preserves unrelated behavior, and passes a new case without masking other causes.
evidence.changedCase: A new sibling and environment reproduce the symptom from another cause.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Bulk rewrite or disappearing symptom proves diagnosis.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record causal-repair competency gap.

interactions.title: Design unseen changed cases
interactions.learnerAction: Partition content, language, direction, quantity, order, resources, IDs, relationships, inputs, states, keyboard, zoom, viewport, persistence, failure, retry, reset, and recovery mutations by named invariant.

evidence.observable: Every mutation preserves objective, targets causal invariant, rejects a near-miss, and predicts exact observable failure and repair boundary.
evidence.changedCase: Happy path stays fixed while every realistic variation dimension changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Random cases or input volume produce coverage.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record changed-case design competency gap.

interactions.title: Debug shallow regression suite
interactions.learnerAction: Replace keyword, DOM-shape, screenshot, fixed-example, duplicated, and random tests with runnable behavior, consumer, task, changed-case, causal-diagnosis, invariant, and near-miss evidence.

evidence.observable: Every test has distinct scenario, behavior, mutation, evidence, failure meaning, correction value, and later regression purpose.
evidence.changedCase: Source shape changes while required behavior and objective remain constant.

interactions.feedbackTarget: More assertions make shallow checks robust.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record regression-quality competency gap.

interactions.title: Defend cumulative HTML diagnosis
interactions.learnerAction: Defend source, parser, document, access, form, table, tool, hypothesis, repair, invariant, mutation, near-miss, retest, environment, limitation, risk, and future-maintenance decisions without publication overclaim.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent cumulative diagnostic defense is committed.

evidence.observable: Every claim is original, reproducible, dependency-aware, consumer-specific, task-specific, mutation-tested, evidence-bounded, and honest about missing review or pilots.
evidence.changedCase: Tool version, browser, content, relationships, state, viewport, and user report all change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Green checkpoint permits robust or complete claim.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record cumulative diagnostic evidence gaps.

authorshipBoundary.interpretation: This artifact fixes interaction intent and evidence before authoring; it is neither publishable learner content nor a source for automatic prose generation.

gaps: Independent subject, instructional-design, assessment, accessibility, responsive, assistive-technology, and duplication reviews are not yet complete.

Learner-facing copy, original runnable starters, deterministic malformed-source and consumer fixtures, pinned local checker, canonical answers, executable checks, browser evidence, delayed scheduler, and learner pilots remain unauthored.
